query: SELECT engagementScore, notaEvolucao, COUNT(*) as qty FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE engagementScore IS NOT NULL OR notaEvolucao IS NOT NULL GROUP BY engagementScore, notaEvolucao ORDER BY engagementScore, notaEvolucao LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT engagementScore, notaEvolucao, COUNT(*) as qty FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE engagementScore IS NOT NULL OR notaEvolucao IS NOT NULL GROUP BY engagementScore, notaEvolucao ORDER BY engagementScore, notaEvolucao LIMIT 30;
